title: Storybook CSF (Component Story Format) File Structure
description: Documentation of the Component Story Format used in Storybook story files (.stories.js/ts/jsx/tsx)

sections.name: Default Export (Meta)
sections.description: The default export is the component meta, defining the component and shared configuration

fields.name: title
fields.description: Sidebar path like 'Components/Button'. Optional with auto-title.

fields.name: args
fields.description: Default arg values for all stories

fields.name: decorators
fields.description: Wrapper functions applied to all stories

sections.name: Named Exports (Stories)
sections.description: Each named export is a story representing a component state

fields.name: name
fields.description: Custom story display name (defaults to export name)

sections.name: Story Render Patterns
sections.description: How stories are rendered in CSF

patterns.name: Default render (no render function)
patterns.description: Component is rendered directly with args as props
patterns.example: export const Primary = { args: { label: 'Button', variant: 'primary' } }

patterns.name: Custom render function
patterns.description: Story provides a custom render function for complex setups

patterns.name: Interaction test story
patterns.description: Story with play function for automated interaction testing
patterns.example: export const Filled = { play: async ({ canvasElement }) => { await userEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button')) } }
